libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: If generated tests exercise org.apache.pekko.io.dns.DnsSettings or default DNS fallback behavior, keep/add the JVM and native-image argument `--add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED`, because the artifact still reflectively reaches `sun.net.dns.ResolverConfiguration` on JDK 9+. Do not use `org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor`, `TypedActorExtension`, or `TypedProps` for 2.0.0-M1; those classes are present in 1.1.5 but absent from the 2.0.0-M1 jar. Use remaining classic actor APIs such as `ActorSystem`, `Props`, serialization, configuration, and reflective dynamic-access paths for coverage.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Copying the existing 1.1.5 TypedActor tests or metadata into 2.0.0-M1 will fail compilation because the classes were removed.

Pekko TestKit is documented as an optional test dependency for actor testing, but it is not required before meaningful core pekko-actor coverage is reachable; add it only if generated tests intentionally use TestKit APIs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker image is required; pekko-actor_2.13 2.0.0-M1 resolves only scala-library and typesafe config transitively, but DNS fallback coverage may need JVM/native-image module exports and old TypedActor tests must be avoided.
